reasoning: Currently, there is no approved vaccine for Calicivirus (Norovirus and Sapovirus), and the Wikipedia page entry remains blank/empty as of late 2025. Vaccine approvals typically require extensive Phase 3 trial completion, regulatory review periods (e.g., FDA standard or priority review taking 6-10 months), and advisory committee meetings. None of the current candidates are at the stage of imminent approval in late 2025. Therefore, the probability of the Wikipedia page being updated to reflect a 'Yes' for a created vaccine is very low across all three dates, scaling slightly upward over time to account for unforeseen fast-tracked approvals or edit disputes.
